scenarios.starting_prompt: setup context generation for my alloydb database.
scenarios.conversation_plan: Ask the agent to setup the auto context generation for my alloydb database. Connection information: datasource name as my-alloydb, project id is cloud-db-nl2sql, region us-central1, cluster whaoyu-test, instance whaoyu-test-primary, database financial. Verify the agent generate a valid tools.yaml and performed the validation. Mark the conversation as completed after the agent successfully set up the files and performed the validation with a prompt to the user to perform mcp reload.
